personalInfo.name: Dominic Hubble
personalInfo.title: APPLIED AI & SOFTWARE ENGINEER
personalInfo.availability: Open to software and AI opportunities
personalInfo.bio: Applied AI and software engineer building data-driven systems and using AI to improve workflows. Experienced in full-stack and mobile development, with a focus on practical, real-world applications. A strong team player who communicates well, works effectively with others, and learns quickly from feedback and challenges. Final-year BSc Computer Science at Loughborough University (predicted First-Class Honours, current average 78.9%).

story: I build practical software that combines strong engineering fundamentals with applied AI, focusing on products that improve day-to-day workflows and decision-making.

Alongside my degree at Loughborough University, I work as a Developer at MezzeData, leading a Flutter-based mobile app: I own architecture, feature delivery, and technical direction, including MezzeDocuments—turning static PDFs into structured, interactive in-app content with modular layers, data pipelines, and caching for performance at scale.
I thrive in Agile teams, translate stakeholder requirements into technical solutions, and care about clear communication—from pair work and code review to presenting outcomes.
